description: Manifest loader and validator -- JSON parsing, Zod schema validation execution, error collection with actionable messages (file paths, field names, expected vs actual values), fail-fast behavior per C-10 (invalid manifests never produce partial output). Reports all validation errors at once rather than one-at-a-time.
notes: Tier 2 engine core. Applies the schema from OBJ-004 to actual manifest files. Covers TC-07 (validation catches errors). Spec complete: two-phase validation (structural Zod + semantic registry), all-at-once error collection, FILE_READ_ERROR code for non-ENOENT fs errors, skip-on-unknown pattern, floating-point tolerances for overlap/audio checks.
